title: CheesicScan 5: The Movie (The Cheesasaurus Rex Collab)
description:
This video is a collabaroni!
 
From the collective minds of over 60 different individuals, we bring you the cheesiest collab you’ll ever see. Full list of songs used and participants below. Please be sure to check out their channels and other work!
 
BGM / Participants List: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Y5yiKcOBzFO4ATTtKgizI6kEanE5BnTL9EDToPEiAX4/edit?usp=sharing
 
I know this is a long video, but a lot of work and love was put into every second. Please watch all the way through, even if it takes you a couple sittings.
 
100% inspired by and wouldn’t have happened without Wielki Mix NiecikTube:
https://youtu.be/aBakyAB-G60
 
Happy 10th anniversary to the true classic, zeroscan!
https://youtu.be/jXASzd3YBX8

Extra special thanks to:
rodricoro for moderating and help with organizing the collab; creating the collab logo; a lot of behind the scenes stuff.
omknee for a lot of last second help with rendering this monster of a project in time.
Torjuz, goomba, and Soaroz for behind the scenes help and tips.

We have no affiliation with Kraft Foods… yet?

Playlist of separately uploaded parts (so far):
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLvaocTnS9kmhiwQnjz57UJ59K3i4n5Rje
